# Norm / Elementwise / Epilogue PRs

Optimization recipe: Look for fusion, vectorization, dtype conversion, and store-traffic reductions before changing math.

NCU first look: DRAM %, L2 bytes, global load/store sectors, eligible warps, and long scoreboard.

## Inspection Questions

- Which loads/stores were eliminated or vectorized?
- Does the PR preserve dtype conversion and numerical tolerance?

## PRs

| Repo | PR | Merged | What to inspect | Ledger key |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
